text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp has arrived. Air Shakur is
determined to get in tip-top form for the Kikuka
Sho—and for the new future it will bring.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp is an essential period. The growth I
can achieve here will have a direct impact on my
future.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I've reorganized our training schedule. I'll make
changes as necessary, but this will be the main
plan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I really am terrifically excited. I've gone over all
the relevant training so much that I know it by
heart.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no way Air Shakur can use her computer
the whole time in this blazing heat.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I pulled an all-nighter and memorized as much
important data as possible so that I'll be ready
when she has to put the computer away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It took me until the day of the Derby itself to do
something truly helpful, so I want to use this
summer camp to improve my own skills as a
trainer.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It's already all decided. I don't need you for
anything.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Ah, wait... I guess you can carry my water bottle.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Don't go burstin' a blood vessel from all the
excitement.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Seriously. There's no point in getting excited. At
all.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
It's kinda difficult to tell which one of them is supposed
to be the trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so begins our summer camp of blazing
growth.
